feeling.heading:
Just tell us the vibe
you want today
feeling.sub: A rough feeling is enough. We'll turn the mood into date cards.
feeling.placeholder: Ex: I want somewhere quiet with good conversation today.
feeling.freeTextHint: Keywords work best — try things like "Japanese food", "BBQ", "escape room".

generating.courseHeading:
Planning a course
that fits both of you
generating.defaultHeading:
Choosing ideas
that fit both of you
generating.courseError: Something went wrong while creating the course.
generating.courseExpired: This request has expired. Please review your conditions and try again.

courseErrors.INSUFFICIENT_CANDIDATES: We couldn't find enough matching places nearby. Try broadening the area, steps, or walking limit.
courseErrors.STEP_INTENT_UNSATISFIED: We couldn't find nearby places matching that specific request. Try relaxing it or widening the area.
courseErrors.STEP_PIN_UNAVAILABLE: We couldn't verify the place you picked. Please choose another place.
courseErrors.PLACE_SEARCH_TIMEOUT: Place search took too long. Please try again shortly.
courseErrors.PLACE_SEARCH_RATE_LIMITED: Place search is busy. Please try again shortly.
courseErrors.AUTH_EXPIRED: Your sign-in expired. Sign in again and retry.
courseErrors.AI_TIMEOUT: Recommendation generation took too long. Please try again.
courseErrors.AI_INVALID_RESPONSE: We couldn't validate the recommendation. Please retry.
courseErrors.COURSE_VALIDATION_FAILED: We couldn't make one course that satisfies those conditions together. Try adjusting them.
courseErrors.NETWORK_ERROR: Check your network connection and try again.
courseErrors.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong while creating the course.

courseFailureStages.course_build: We could not assemble distinct places for these conditions. Try adjusting the area or course steps.
courseFailureStages.response_schema: We could not verify the generated course format. Please try again.
courseFailureStages.request_response_validation: The generated course does not match the selected conditions. Try adjusting them.
courseFailureStages.stage_attestation: We had trouble safely saving the generated course. Please try again shortly.

generating.defaultError: Something went wrong while creating recommendations.

relaxation.title: No exact match for that condition
relaxation.body: We couldn't find a place that meets your ‘{{conditions}}’ condition nearby. Relax it and we'll look for similar spots.
relaxation.relaxButton: Relax the condition and search again

result.errorSub:
Something went wrong while creating recommendations.
We'll try again.
result.heading:
These date ideas
look right for today
result.sub: Save them to react and comment from Our Ideas.

courseResult.loadError: We couldn't load this saved course. Check the link or try again.
courseResult.heading: How about this course?
courseResult.sub: Tap the conditions to review them, and tap a place to adjust it.

stepIntents.title: Your request
stepIntents.unsupported: ‘{{term}}’ couldn't be applied to this course

courseResult.editError: We couldn't save this course change. Please try again.
courseResult.confirmFirst: Confirm this course before sharing it.
courseResult.detailNotice: Check reviews and operating information directly with the external service. Date Navi does not store or verify third-party review content.
courseResult.replacementNotice: The top three appear first. Check reviews and maps directly with the external service.
courseResult.replacementEmpty: No other replacement options are available.
courseResult.searchHint: Find a specific place for this step

bucketlist.savedBody: You can find it under "Next time" in Our Ideas.
bucketlist.saveError: Something went wrong while saving. Please try again.
bucketlist.title:
What do you want to do
next time you meet?
bucketlist.sub:
Places, activities, or vibes all work.
Write any idea that comes to mind.
bucketlist.label: Idea
bucketlist.placeholder: Ex) Night drive, ocean-view cafe, a relaxed weekend trip...
bucketlist.tipText:
· Brunch at an ocean-view cafe
· Go for a night drive
· Spend the day at a theme park
· A small camping trip just for us
